label: Control Plane Shift Detection Pattern
description: TSMM-native pattern for identifying when authority moves from institutional process into infrastructural execution surfaces.

nodes.label: Control plane shift domain
nodes.description: Domain where effective authority migrates into infrastructure.

nodes.label: Platform or control service
nodes.description: Operational surface where authority becomes executable.

nodes.label: Shift detection policy
nodes.description: Policy for identifying and recording authority relocation.

nodes.label: Authority relocation assessment
nodes.description: Evaluates whether a material shift has occurred.

nodes.label: Shift recognition decision
nodes.description: Determines whether the relocation requires governance intervention.

nodes.label: Control plane shift record
nodes.description: Structured evidence of the relocation event.

nodes.label: Governance review effect
nodes.description: Triggers review, control hardening, or remediation.

edges.description: Existing authority defines what counts as a material shift.
Detection policy constrains how execution surfaces are assessed.
Decision produces a structured shift record.
Decision triggers governance review or remediation.
